vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements.description: Provide a central pod for housing equipment and motor mount.
Include an equipment bay door for access.
Attach to wing spars for structural integrity.
Support motor pylon attachment for motor mount.
Ensure cooling airflow through motor pod.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.path: Lift force from airfoil to fuselage frames via spar and carry-through
Airflow over wing surface, through leading edge ducts to cooling system
Heat from electronics transferred to exterior via heat sinks on spar
Pitch and roll control via actuator arms mounted on spar
Pressure distribution along wing span transferred to fuselage frames
Electrical wiring harnesses running along spar to avionics bay

integration_opportunities.opportunity: Integrate leading edge duct directly into spar socket for streamlined airflow
Use anti-rotation key to ensure consistent alignment between wing halves
Mount actuators on spar for precise pitch and roll control
Route wiring harnesses through spar to maintain structural integrity
Create service access cutout for easy maintenance and inspection

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads
manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures oriented for minimal distortion during FDM printing
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection for alignment and fit, CMM for critical dimensions

verification_focus.value: Continuous from spar to fuselage frames
Ensures consistent alignment between wing halves
Cutout allows easy maintenance and inspection

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Servo pockets, control horns, pushrod/linkage channels
physics_paths: Load path: Servo load transferred to wing structure via servo pocket and control horn.
Flow path: Control signals travel from flight controller to servo via connector mate and harness passthrough.
Thermal path: Heat generated by servo dissipates through servo pocket to surrounding wing structure.
Motion path: Control horn moves in response to servo actuation, translating rotational motion into elevon deflection.
Pressure path: Aerodynamic pressure on wing surface is transmitted to elevon via control horn and linkage
integration_opportunities: Optimize servo pocket shape for weight reduction while maintaining structural integrity.
Improve heat dissipation from servo to wing structure.
Enhance control horn attachment strength and reliability.

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection for alignment and fit

verification_focus: Mass verification: Ensure total mass does not exceed 50g.
Fit verification: Confirm servo pocket and control horn socket fit properly.
Function verification: Validate control horn movement and signal transmission through harness.
